primary_sources.name: CMS Conditions for Coverage for End-Stage Renal Disease Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Federal baseline requirements that states must meet or exceed for dialysis facility licensure

primary_sources.name: State Operations Manual - Appendix V: Survey Procedures and Interpretive Guidance for ESRD Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Provides survey procedures used by state agencies for dialysis facility oversight

primary_sources.name: National Conference of State Legislatures Health Professional Licensing Database
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive database of state-specific licensing requirements for healthcare professionals including APPs

primary_sources.name: Certificate of Need State Health Laws and Programs
primary_sources.relevance: Overview of state CON requirements affecting dialysis facility development

secondary_sources.name: State Health Department Dialysis Facility Regulations Compendium
secondary_sources.relevance: CDC compilation of state-specific dialysis facility regulations and reporting requirements

gaps: Limited centralized source for real-time updates on state regulatory changes
Inconsistent availability of state-specific adverse event reporting requirements
Variable access to current state privacy and data security law interpretations for healthcare
